decision.title: Choose AIRCA packaging direction
decision.question: How should AIRCA be packaged first to maximize usability and GitHub adoption?
decision.context: The project needs a practical first release that is easy to run, easy to explain, and strong enough to generate future papers and examples.
decision.rationale: This path balances speed, clarity, and real-world usefulness while creating a direct path from decisions to reusable public knowledge.
action_items: Use generated papers as public artifacts

options.name: Python package + publish pipeline
options.description: Ship a usable package and turn decisions into white-paper-style outputs.

options.name: Theory docs only
options.description: Keep expanding conceptual docs without productized outputs.

assumptions: People adopt tools faster than abstract frameworks
uncertainties: How quickly contributors will adopt the paper workflow
Which use case will resonate most first
